caption: Rachel you and Marcus coming up to Atlanta for the 4th? Karen's already planning the whole spread. Ethan and Lily are asking every day.
Yes!! We'll be there Friday night. Marcus is already talking about the grill lol
Tell him I've got the brisket handled. He can take the ribs. No negotiating.
Deal 😂 how's the clinic? You surviving summer?
Slammed. Half my athletes are training for fall season, other half are just wrecked from the heat. Green days are rare right now.
Ok but real quick — Dad called me freaking out about his knee again this week 😭
He texted me too. Told him to scale back on the golf. He won't. Classic Robert.
Some things never change 😂 see y'all Friday!
